meta_title: For Freelancers: SaaS pricing to Solve can't scale projects (Intermediate Case Study)
meta_description: Learn how to SaaS pricing and overcome can't scale projects. A Intermediate-level Case Study using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: SaaS Pricing Strategy for Freelancers: Scaling Your Output
content.seo_description: Stop trading time for money. Learn how to implement scalable SaaS pricing models using Antigravity and Claude Code to break your project bottleneck today.
content.answer_block: To scale past manual hourly billing, implement a value-based, tiered SaaS pricing model. By leveraging Antigravity for rapid scaffolding and Claude Code for iterative deployment, you transform your workflow from custom-coded labor into a high-margin, repeatable product ecosystem that maximizes revenue while minimizing development time for your clients.
content.intro:
The clock is your greatest enemy. You’re trapped in a cycle of bespoke development, where every new client project feels like starting from scratch. Your code is clean, your clients are happy, but you are hitting a ceiling—you cannot scale your income without sacrificing your sanity or your sleep.

It’s time to stop thinking like a freelancer and start building like a SaaS architect. By shifting your pricing from hourly labor to value-based product tiers and automating your deployment pipeline with AI-driven tooling, you reclaim your time. This isn't just about faster coding; it's about shifting your entire business model into an automated, high-margin machine.

steps.title: Define Value-Based Tiers
steps.description: Move away from hourly rates. Identify the specific business problem you solve and create three pricing tiers: Starter, Pro, and Enterprise, mapped to feature gates.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a SaaS pricing schema for a B2B project management tool. Create three tiers: Basic, Pro, and Enterprise. Include a JSON structure that defines feature limits per tier, such as user counts and API request thresholds.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --task 'implement pricing-tiers.json into the auth middleware to enforce feature gating'

steps.title: Automate Feature Gating
steps.description: Hard-coding pricing logic is a maintenance nightmare. Use a centralized provider to manage access control based on the user's subscription tier.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Write a TypeScript decorator that checks if the authenticated user has the 'pro' feature flag enabled before executing the controller logic.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --task 'apply the feature-gate decorator to all routes in the /api/v1/pro-tools directory'

steps.title: Implement Stripe Integration
steps.description: Connect your pricing tiers to a live payment processor to handle subscription upgrades, downgrades, and trial periods automatically.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a Stripe webhook handler in Node.js that listens for 'customer.subscription.updated' and updates the user's internal database tier status.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --task 'integrate stripe webhooks into the billing controller and ensure database sync'

steps.title: Optimize Deployment Velocity
steps.description: Use Claude Code to automate the testing and deployment flow, ensuring every pricing change is verified before hitting production.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a CI/CD script that runs unit tests on the pricing logic and deploys to Vercel only if the build passes.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --task 'configure github actions for automated testing and deployment of the billing module'

steps.title: Iterative Feedback Loop
steps.description: Monitor which tiers are converting and use AI to adjust your feature sets based on real user behavior data.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a summary report script that analyzes Stripe subscription data and suggests which features should be moved between tiers to increase conversion.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --task 'create a dashboard component to visualize subscription tier distribution'

pro_tips: Always price your 'Enterprise' tier at 3x your 'Pro' price to anchor value and drive mid-market conversions.
Use feature flags for pricing tiers; it allows you to toggle functionality without redeploying your entire application.
Automate your customer churn emails using the same webhook logic that handles your subscription cancellations.
Never hardcode pricing in your frontend; always fetch tier configurations from a secure server-side API.
Build a 'self-serve' upgrade path within the app; removing the 'contact us for pricing' friction increases conversions by up to 40%.
content.next_steps: Now that you have automated your pricing and feature gating, audit your existing client projects to identify which modules can be extracted into a reusable, paid-tier library. Start by migrating one client to this automated model to test your revenue uplift.
content.conversion_block: Stop settling for hourly wages and start building an asset that earns while you sleep. The tools are here, the blueprint is ready, and the market is waiting. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
